title: Hazardous waste news bulletin  - Canada.ca
content:
## Hazardous waste news bulletin
The Hazardous Waste and Hazardous Recyclable Materials news bulletin contains important information about federal regulatory requirements, changes and updates pertaining to hazardous waste management.

## Subscribe to the Hazardous Waste News Bulletin
To subscribe to our Hazardous Waste News Bulletin, please contact your regional office. If there are updates to your company and contact information, contact the regional office closest to your facility by e-mail.
dechets-py-waste@ec.gc.ca
promconrpn-compropnr@ec.gc.ca
promcon-on-compro@ec.gc.ca
dechets-qc-waste@ec.gc.ca
promo-atl-compro@ec.gc.ca

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
